headline: U.S. launches fresh Section 301 probes into 60 economies over forced-labor trade practices
summary: The forced-labor probes follow Section 301 investigations launched on Wednesday, targeting excess industrial capacity across more than a dozen economies.

raw.headline: U.S. launches fresh Section 301 probes into 60 economies over forced-labor trade practices
raw.summary: The forced-labor probes follow Section 301 investigations launched on Wednesday, targeting excess industrial capacity across more than a dozen economies.

headline: G-III Apparel Group Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: G-III Apparel Group (NASDAQ:GIII) executives said fiscal 2026 marked a “pivotal year” in the company’s portfolio transition, as it continues to exit its Calvin Klein and Tommy Hilfiger licensed businesses while leaning more heavily into owned brands such as DKNY, Donna Karan, Karl Lagerfeld and Vile
